## Tests

- [ ] Added tests for the new behavior
- [ ] Existing tests still pass (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`ruff check . && ruff format --check .`)
- [ ] Type-check clean (`mypy src/`)

## Benchmark impact

If this changes runtime behavior of `nom.text` or `nom.doc`, paste the relevant
benchmark numbers before/after. Don't publish unverified numbers — run the script.

## Vietnamese-specific notes

If this affects diacritic handling, OCR, tokenization, or extraction quality,
include a Vietnamese sample showing input → expected output.
